title: Space hound
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Space hounds''' were [[Dog/Legends|canines]] which many [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] were familiar with. The creatures were known to have been difficult to catch. [[Crimson Jack/Legends|Crimson Jack]] insulted [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] by calling him a "slippery [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] space hound."

==Behind the scenes==
Crimson Jack's phraseology may only refer to Han being from Corellia, but could mean the space hound is also native to that world.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 15|''Star Wars'' (1977) 15]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 15}} {{Mo}}
